result.query: goal Goal.strength experience ExperienceLevel.intermediate equipment штанга гантели скамья restrictions дискомфорт в колене exercises Присед есть небольшой дискомфорт в колене, но без резкой боли progression increase load

documents.title: Strength plan with barbell, rack and bench
documents.content: If the goal is strength and the user has a barbell, rack and bench, the initial plan should center around squat, bench press, deadlift or hinge variation, overhead press and rows. Use relatively low repetitions, stable technique and conservative weekly progression.

documents.title: Progressive overload after confident execution
documents.content: If the athlete completes all planned sets with solid technique and RPE at or below 7, a small progression in the next session is acceptable. Increase load slightly, add a repetition, or keep the same load with tighter execution.

documents.title: Knee pain and no deep squats
documents.content: With knee pain or a restriction against deep squats, avoid recommending deep squat patterns. Prefer box squat to pain-free depth, split squat with reduced range, hip hinge patterns, glute bridge, Romanian deadlift, step-up with conservative depth and leg work that does not aggravate symptoms.
